posts.community: Kamat Hotels (India) Ltd- A Possible Turnaround Story!
posts.text: The interest cost in the latest quarter was at 10 Cr compared to 7 Cr in the last quarter. what was the reason for this as the debt did not increase so much q on q?

posts.author: Ram_M
posts.community: Kamat Hotels (India) Ltd- A Possible Turnaround Story!
posts.text: It good to see Goes increasing stake in Kamat by 2%. In Normal circumstances that is brent falls below 100, then we can easily expect 360 cr fy27 vs 386 cr fy26. We can easily expect 400cr+ in fy28. Profit will be more if margin expands as stated by Mgmt, may be around 50cr. Real kick happens only if occupancy expands or key cross 2500. Hope new CFO who has rich experience will bring major changes to Kamat image 1639×764 72.1 KB
